summary: Iter-2 spec for Sprint 6 (REQ-FEED-030.1 + REQ-FEED-034) FAILS on two HIGH defects that block Phase 2a entry. (1) The fast-check seed literal `0xS6BABE` (CRIT-301 passThreshold; verification-architecture.md:802,853; contracts/sprint-6.md:25,30) is not a syntactically valid JavaScript hex literal — the character `S` is not a hex digit, so any test file containing `seed: 0xS6BABE` fails at parse time with SyntaxError. The Sprint 6 grading criterion CRIT-301 is unsatisfiable as written. (2) PROP-FEED-S6-004 is misclassified as `Failing test (RED) 必須` in the Phase 2a gate when its specification (re-asserts existing Sprint 1 PROP-FEED-001 behavior) means the production code already satisfies it — the same TDD invariant violation that iter-1 FIND-S6-SPEC-006 was supposed to resolve, which the Builder fixed for S6-005/S6-006 but left for S6-004. Three MEDIUM findings concern: PROP-FEED-S6-002 lacks a synchronization clause for the REQ-FEED-031 fallback `$effect` (will produce false counter-examples on the non-emptiness limb); the arithmetic `4 cell × 2 adapter × 6 blocks = 48 patterns` is wrong and the statistical claim that numRuns=200 covers all cells is unjustified; PROP-FEED-S6-007 is a near-duplicate of PROP-FEED-S6-001's EC-FEED-024 row, risking parallel-evidence inflation in CRIT-301. Two LOW findings address REQ-FEED-034 EARS form (numbered list inside a single SHALL clause) and a misattributed cross-reference at line 1038 (cell 2 unreachability cites REQ-FEED-009 which is about pendingNextNoteId, not the idle-state invariant). DOM hierarchy description (REQ-FEED-034 §DOM 階層の正確な記述) was independently verified against FeedRow.svelte:322-471 and is correct. Truth table 5 rows (cell 1 effectiveMount=true / EC-FEED-024 row / cell 2 / cell 3 / cell 4) coherently cover all reachable + defensive states. Test path convention `__tests__/dom/` is consistent. PROP-FEED-S6-003 hardened regex is well-formed but enumerates only 3 of ~8 known CSS-hiding bypass patterns (FIND-iter2-006). Verdict cannot proceed to PASS until at minimum FIND-iter2-001 (seed) and FIND-iter2-002 (S6-004 RED misclassification) are resolved, since both block CRIT-301 / CRIT-302 evaluation respectively.
